rationale: The citing paper references Boyd, Chandy, and Cunha (2010) only as an example of prior work showing a firm-level contingency (customer power) in CMO-performance research. The citation appears in a grouped, positioning-style discussion of related literature rather than in the core theory building, hypothesis logic, model specification, or empirical design of the TMSE mobility study. There is no direct reuse of the cited paper's framework, measures, or methods in the focal analysis.
